# newShareableNetworkAvailable

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the system detected available networks your app extension may request from people.

## Declaration

```swift
let newShareableNetworkAvailable: Bool
```

## Discussion

Your app extension can use [doc://com.apple.wifiinfrastructure/documentation/WiFiInfrastructure/WINetworkSharingProvider/presentAskToShareUI(scanProvider:)] to request that people share the network with your accessory when your accessory needs it. This flag clears when people share the available networks to your accessory or when the networks are no longer available.



## Getting event signals

- **appRequestedSharing**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the container app requested network sharing.
